  • Method Details

    • multicastAddress

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder multicastAddress(String addr) throws UnknownHostException
      Override the multicast group address. Default "224.0.0.224".
      Throws:
      UnknownHostException

    • multicastAddress

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder multicastAddress(InetAddress addr)
      Override the multicast group address by InetAddress.

    • multicastPort

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder multicastPort(int port)
      Override the UDP port. Default 7446.

    • networkInterfaces

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder networkInterfaces(Collection<NetworkInterface> nifs)
      Explicitly bind to the given NICs. If unset, auto-discover all non-loopback, up, multicast-capable NICs.

    • networkInterface

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder networkInterface(String name) throws SocketException
      Convenience: bind to a single NIC by system name (e.g. "eth0", "wlan0", "en0").
      Throws:
      SocketException

    • whatAmIMatcher

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder whatAmIMatcher(WhatAmIMatcher m)
      Restrict what roles this scout looks for. Default: WhatAmIMatcher.any().

    • role

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder role(WhatAmI role)
      Shortcut for whatAmIMatcher(WhatAmIMatcher) from a single role.

    • roles

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder roles(Set<WhatAmI> roles)
      Shortcut for whatAmIMatcher(WhatAmIMatcher) from a set of roles.

    • mode

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder mode(PureJavaZenohScout.Mode m)
      Scout mode. Default PureJavaZenohScout.Mode.ACTIVE.

    • scoutIntervalMillis

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder scoutIntervalMillis(long ms)
      Interval between active SCOUT emissions. Ignored in PureJavaZenohScout.Mode.PASSIVE. Minimum 250 ms to avoid melting anyone's network; default 3000L ms.

    • staleTimeoutMillis

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder staleTimeoutMillis(long ms)
      How long since the last HELLO before a node is considered gone. Should be at least a few times the scoutInterval so a temporary packet loss doesn't evict a still-live node. Default 15000L ms.

    • protocolVersion

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder protocolVersion(int v)
      Protocol version to put in emitted SCOUTs. Default 0x09.

    • selfZid

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder selfZid(ZenohId zid)
      Include our own ZID in emitted SCOUTs. Optional; by default the SCOUT's I flag is 0 and no ZID is sent. A fixed ZID lets counterparties recognise repeated scouts from the same source.

    • receiveBufferBytes

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder receiveBufferBytes(int n)
      Receive buffer size per packet. Default 65,507 bytes (UDP max).

    • listener

      public PureJavaZenohScout.Builder listener(ScoutListener l)
      Attach a single listener at build time. Multiple listeners: use PureJavaZenohScout.addListener(io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.scouting.ScoutListener).

    • build

      public PureJavaZenohScout build()
